title: Dokucraft Light
description: Dokucraft is one of the oldest Minecraft resource packs that are still around. It is maintained entirely by the community, anyone can contribute, and it comes in multiple flavours based on different styles of fantasy.
body:
![Dokucraft Light](https://cdn.discordapp.com/attachments/346046175339610113/570648961648689183/unknown.png)

## Dokucraft The Saga Continues
Dokucraft Light is one of the oldest Minecraft resource packs that are still around. It is maintained entirely by the community, anyone can contribute, and it comes in multiple flavours based on different styles of fantasy. The pack is mainly inspired by old school RPGs, like The Legend of Zelda: A Link to the Past.

## History
The pack was first released by Doku in April 2011 for Minecraft Beta 1.5. Doku kept working on the pack until July, when he announced that he would no longer continue it and that the assets were free to use for other packs.

Previously, Doku had discontinued another texture pack called Doku RPG in a similar way, and when it happened, a dozen remix packs popped up that tried to continue it in their own ways, and most of them were discontinued in only a few months.

To avoid this happening with Dokucraft and instead focus the community's efforts to continue the original pack, as opposed to some strange mix of older packs, HickeryDickery created The Saga Continues project.

The Saga Continues originally focused on just finishing the pack as it was missing quite a few textures when it was discontinued, and then to update it when new game updates came out. It was open for everyone to help, anyone could contribute, as long as it fit the pack's style and rules. In just a few months, over a thousand textures had been posted by over a hundred contributors.

Since then, we have expanded from three flavours only for Java Edition to four flavours both on Java and Bedrock, and over 20,000 textures in total have been submitted by over 500 contributors.

## Features
<details>
<summary>Vanilla don't requires mods!</summary>

- Day Skybox requires Fabulous Graphic!!
- Night Skybox requires Fabulous Graphic!!
- Night Sky Auroras requires Fabulous Graphic!!
- End Skybox Rift
- Swinging Lanterns
- Enchanted Menus
- Wavy Plants
- Better Note Symbol
- Emissive Block Textures
- Emissive Mob Textures
- Emissive Item Textures
- Emissive Particles
- Wavy Water / Lava
- Loading Screen Background Colour
- Animated Selection Box
- Custom Tooltips
- Banner patterns
- Better Note Symbol
- Enchanted Menus

</details>

<details>
<summary>Optifine required!</summary>

- CTM
- CTM overlay
- CIT
- CEM
- CIT spawn eggs
- CIT Enchanted Books
- Emissive Block Textures
- Emissive Mob Textures
- Emissive Item Textures
- Random Mobs
- Loading Screen logo
- Custom Colormaps
- Day Skybox
- Night Skybox
- Shooting stars
- End skybox

</details>

## Want to help?
Anyone can contribute to the project. That includes you. Even if you don't know how to create textures or other assets needed for the pack, there are community members willing to help you learn how. We also have a [quick start guide](https://docs.google.com/document/d/1HsC6ut8ytQOQLyM17X6f2AHH0pDHCv23YSxav9odIm4/preview) to get you going with resource pack editing.

If you need any help, feel free to ask us any questions in [our Discord server](https://dokucraft.co.uk/discord). If you are not sure if a texture you have made is good enough, you can post it in the appropriate Discord channel and ask for feedback. Someone will hopefully take a good look at it and help you make it better. Remember to always be open to criticism, it will help you improve.

[![Discode](https://i.imgur.com/fZ59via.png)](https://discordapp.com/invite/jjg59ce)

If you don't know what to work on, you can always check our [update status page](https://stash.dokucraft.co.uk/?status) or ask on Discord. If you want to find textures posted by others, check out [DokuStash](https://stash.dokucraft.co.uk/).

## Other Packs
